Container.Name: LanLens
Container.Overview: LanLens is a self-hosted network discovery and documentation tool for home labs and small environments.
Container.Description: LanLens discovers, documents, and monitors local network devices. It is intended for home labs and small environments that need a self-hosted view of discovered devices, services, SNMP identity data, and CMDB/i-doit export metadata.
Container.Requires: Host networking plus NET_ADMIN and NET_RAW capabilities are required for local ARP/MAC discovery. Set a strong SECRET_KEY before first startup.

Config.Name: App Data
Config.Description: Persistent LanLens data, including SQLite database, settings, and TLS material.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Required encryption/signing key. Generate with: python3 -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"

Config.Name: Default Admin Password
Config.Description: Initial admin password for first startup. Change it after login.

Config.Name: LanLens Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host-mode port used by the LanLens Web UI.

Config.Name: Backend Port
Config.Description: Internal FastAPI backend port behind nginx. Leave unchanged unless there is a port conflict.
